# Manual Extracts — Do Not Edit

The files in this directory are **read-only reference documentation** extracted from official Panasonic technical manuals.

| File | Source |
|---|---|
| `hpm-controller.md` | PAW-HPM Part 1 (HBInstIB) — Installation & Commissioning guide |
| `operating-modes.md` | WH-MXF09/12 Mono-bloc Service Manual — Operation & Control section |
| `error-codes.md` | WH-MXF09/12 Mono-bloc Service Manual — Troubleshooting section + PAW-HPM Part 1 error message appendix |

## Policy

**These files must not be edited, supplemented, or reformatted.**

They represent factual content from the manufacturer's documentation and are intentionally kept verbatim so they remain a reliable reference.  If you discover an error or missing information, trace it back to the source PDF in `import/` and open a discussion rather than patching this file directly.

Source PDFs:
- `import/HPM_HBInstIB_en.pdf` — PAW-HPM Part 1 (English)
- `import/Aquarea-part2-modules.pdf` — PAW-HPM Part 2 (English)
- `import/monobloc-service-manual.pdf` — WH-MXF09/12 service manual (English)
